content.title: XRP consolidation may transform into explosive rally if $1.40 is topped: Data
content.summary: XRP transaction activity on Binance mirrors a 2025 signal that preceded the altcoin’s run to an all-time high. Could it happen again?

content.title: Figure and Hastra widen DeFi credit offering with auto loan launch
content.summary: Figure is adding auto loans to Democratized Prime and extending Hastra beyond Solana, widening tokenized consumer credit access for DeFi investors.

content.title: Federal Reserve chair nominee's disclosure includes crypto and AI holdings
content.summary: Kevin Warsh did not include the value of several crypto and AI investments among his disclosures as he awaits his confirmation hearing before the Senate Banking Committee.

content.title: Bitcoin hits $76K after US PPI inflation stays tame: Will BTC hold its gains?
content.summary: Bitcoin rallied to levels not seen since early February after US PPI inflation fell well below market expectations.

content.title: Fake Ledger Live app on Apple App Store drained $9.5M from victims: ZachXBT
content.summary: A Fake Ledger Live app on Apple’s store is tied to $9.5 million in crypto thefts, as ZachXBT links over 50 victims’ funds to a KuCoin-linked mixer and questions Apple’s liability.

content.title: Tether launches self-custodial wallet with cloud backup option
content.summary: Tether launches tether.wallet, a self-custodial app supporting USDT, XAUT, USAT and Bitcoin with cloud-based key backup features.

content.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
content.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

content.title: X product chief Nikita Bier teases a crypto ‘fix’ amid market slump
content.summary: X product chief Nikita Bier teases a crypto “fix” product as speculation grows around an X Money rollout this month, a potential Bitcoin revival and Bier’s Solana ties.

content.title: XRP Ledger taps Boundless for bank-grade privacy on public blockchains
content.summary: XRPL is integrating Boundless’ zero-knowledge tech into its base layer, stepping into the race to offer banks confidential onchain transactions without losing regulatory visibility.

content.title: Deutsche Börse invests $200 million in Kraken parent Payward
content.summary: Deutsche Börse said it will invest $200 million in Kraken’s parent company for a fully diluted stake of 1.5%, subject to regulatory approval.
